name: John Smith
companyDescription: Khalti is a fintech startup that offers a digital wallet and payment ecosystem aimed at increasing cashless transactions in Nepal. The platform enables users to pay utility bills, recharge mobile phones, purchase tickets, and make online payments securely. Khalti also partners with merchants, banks, and service providers to expand digital payment adoption. The company plays a significant role in improving financial inclusion, especially among young users and small merchants.

name: Raj shamani
companyDescription: Asterdio operates a development center in Nepal that delivers custom software solutions for international clients. The company focuses on web application development, cloud infrastructure, UI/UX design, and digital strategy. Its Nepal team works closely with global clients, contributing to complex technical projects. Asterdio provides opportunities for local developers to work on international-level software products.

name: Aashish Bhattrai
companyDescription: Bajra Technologies is a Nepal-based IT company providing software development, quality assurance, and enterprise technology services. The company works with international clients, offering offshore development and technical support. Bajra emphasizes structured engineering processes, employee training, and long-term partnerships. It contributes to skill development in Nepal’s IT workforce.

name: Beyonka Poudel
companyDescription: Leapfrog Technology began as a small software development company in Nepal and gradually expanded into a global technology service provider. The company specializes in building scalable digital products, enterprise software, and cloud-based solutions. Leapfrog emphasizes engineering excellence, agile methodologies, and talent development. It has played a key role in positioning Nepal as a destination for quality software outsourcing.

name: Cristina Sejwal
companyDescription: Incessant Rain Studios is a game development startup focused on creating original video games and interactive digital experiences. The company works on storytelling, game design, and immersive technology. It represents Nepal’s growing presence in the global gaming and creative technology industry. The studio encourages innovation and artistic expression.

name: Bruno Mars
companyDescription: Nepalaya is a small creative and cultural enterprise involved in publishing, literature, arts promotion, and multimedia storytelling. The company produces books, documentaries, exhibitions, and cultural programs focused on Nepali identity and heritage. Nepalaya works with artists, writers, and researchers to preserve and promote cultural narratives. It plays an important role in Nepal’s creative economy.

name: Mike Jaffery
companyDescription: YoungInnovations is a technology-driven social enterprise that builds digital solutions for governance, education, and development sectors. The company collaborates with governments, NGOs, and international organizations. Its projects focus on transparency, citizen engagement, and data-driven decision-making. YoungInnovations blends technology with social impact.

name: Prakash Panthi
companyDescription: Hamro Patro started as a simple Nepali calendar app and evolved into a comprehensive digital platform. It now offers news, utilities, content, and daily-use services to millions of users. The company focuses on localized digital experiences for Nepali users worldwide. Hamro Patro is an example of how a small startup can scale through user-centric design.

name: Marko Sahra
companyDescription: Thulo Technology Pvt. Ltd. operates Thulo.com, a Nepal-focused e-commerce platform designed to support local sellers, small retailers, and domestic manufacturers. The company emphasizes strengthening Nepal’s digital economy by enabling traditional businesses to sell online without heavy technical barriers. Thulo provides product listing, payment integration, logistics coordination, and customer support while promoting locally made products. Its mission is to create a sustainable digital marketplace tailored to Nepal’s infrastructure and consumer behavior.

name: John Doman
companyDescription: Ekbana Solutions is a small software company specializing in digital commerce, enterprise platforms, and cloud-based applications. It works with startups and established businesses to build scalable systems. Ekbana focuses on practical problem-solving, modern architecture, and user-centered design. The company supports Nepal’s growing digital business ecosystem.
